name: Publication Approval
description: Validates director sign-off, visualEssays.ts updated, ArtifactDetailWrapper verified, and deployment readiness. Approval document must not contain rejection. Pre-script auto-registers the essay in the central index.

any_of.description: Director sign-off approval document (essay root level)

validations.description: Publication approval must not contain REJECTED
Publication approval must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
Final verification: page.tsx MUST use ArtifactDetailWrapper at publication time (visual-essay-engineering-standard.md §Red Lines)
Essay must be registered in the central visualEssays.ts index (auto-registered by pre-script)
Frontmatter status must not be FAIL (parsed from YAML)

notes: G9 is the final human gate. The pre_scripts array runs register-essay.mjs before validation, which idempotently inserts the essay into src/data/visualEssays.ts. The contains_text check then verifies the slug is present. This ensures every published essay is indexed. The director reviews the complete package, verifies ArtifactDetailWrapper, and triggers deployment.
